# Extracao: transcription_mp4_10__18_Months___Personal_Mail

---

The 18 month personal mail, the personal handwritten Dear John. Dear John, the reason I'm writing you is it crossed my mind that you are one of my valued customers. New paragraph. Thinking about you and your family. New paragraph. Trust all as well. Call me if you need anything and the number. Put the number there. Quit telling people to call you and not have a number there. This is a gross mistake made in writing emails and letters. And by the way, be great. GC. Grant Cardone. Put your name underneath there. Because many of you do scribble quite a bit. You got scrabble and scribble. Confused. Check it out. What are we doing here in this call? Okay. Personal note. Handwritten. Send it to them. Just check on them. Check on the family. Check on the business. Sign it. Put your number.
